meta.name: cpai-opencode-local
meta.description: CPAI OpenCode local profile for andy's machine. Extends cpai-opencode with /tmp r+w and cpai-workspace r+w grants.

notes.cpai_workspace_write: Write grant requires the sandbox to run AS cpai-andy (DAC). When run as andy via cpai run --sandbox, Landlock permits but DAC denies — /home/cpai-andy is owned by cpai-andy. Use cpai remote serve / cpai remote run for true cpai-andy isolation.
notes.tmp: Fixed — /tmp allow+write grant resolved the $TMPDIR expansion issue in the original patch.
